name: Calculateur Seuil Rentabilite
desc: Calculez Minimum price = (Fixed costs / Units) + Variable unit cost. Exemple: Fixed costs €5,000, 200 units, variable cost €15 = Minimum price = €40/unit. Calculateur...
description: Calculez Minimum price = (Fixed costs / Units) + Variable unit cost. Exemple: Fixed costs €5,000, 200 units, variable cost €15 = Minimum price = €40/unit. Calculateur...
seo_description: Calculez Minimum price = (Fixed costs / Units) + Variable unit cost. Exemple: Fixed costs €5,000, 200 units, variable cost €15 = Minimum price = €40/unit. Calcu
example_label: Finding break-even units for product with €12,fixed costs, €price, and €variable cost.
result_context: Sell unites of {unites} to break even, generating facturacion of {facturacion}. Each unit contributes margen_contribucion of {margen_contribucion}.
formula_display: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs ÷ (Price - Variable Cost)
mistakes: Not accounting for step-fixed costs that change at certain volumes
Assuming variable costs remain constant at all production levels
Forgetting that break-even doesn't include desired profit margin
